name: Pisang Goreng (Banana Fritters-Indonesian Style)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slightly beat the eggs and mix with flour and ½ cup water.
2. Mash the bananas with a fork and mix thoroughly with the flour and egg mixture.
3. Deep-fry the banana and flour mixture by the tablespoonful in hot oil until golden brown.
4. Drain on absorbent paper and dust with cinnamon sugar.
Compiled by Imran C.
